Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in Databricks Genie evidence - no raw rows read x Ask about glossary terms, CDEs, reviewers, version history, and asset associations using governed metadata. I never read raw row values. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to the selected glossary term? → ? Summarize reviewer status for critical CDEs. → ? Which glossary term has the most asset coverage? → Atlas AI uses AI. Review

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 2 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BE-4423-1DD4-9E3C-E9055E678368 SELECT assets.asset_fqn, assets.domain, assets.data_product, assets.criticality, assets.certification, assets.owner_count, assets.open_work_count, quality.outcome AS quality_issue, quality.severity, quality.executed_at, work.status AS governance_work_status, work.created_at AS governance_work_created_at FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` assets LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_quality_latest` quality ON assets.asset_fqn = quality.asset_fqn LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` work ON assets.asset_fqn = work.asset_fqn WHERE (lower(assets.asset_fqn) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(assets.table_name) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(assets.data_product) LIKE '%dashboard%') AND (assets.is_critical = TRUE OR assets.is_certified = FALSE OR assets.open_work_count > 0 OR (quality.executed_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AND lower(COALESCE(quality.outcome, '')) NOT IN ('pass', 'passed', 'success', 'succeeded')) OR (work.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AND lower(COALESCE(work.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open')) ) ORDER BY quality.exec

evidenceDetail.text: QUERY EVIDENCE 2 metadata rows returned x STATEMENT 01F146BE-4423-1DD4-9E3C-E9055E678368 SELECT assets.asset_fqn, assets.domain, assets.data_product, assets.criticality, assets.certification, assets.owner_count, assets.open_work_count, quality.outcome AS quality_issue, quality.severity, quality.executed_at, work.status AS governance_work_status, work.created_at AS governance_work_created_at FROM `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_assets_current` assets LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_quality_latest` quality ON assets.asset_fqn = quality.asset_fqn LEFT JOIN `datapact`.`atlas_ai`.`atlas_ai_governance_work_current` work ON assets.asset_fqn = work.asset_fqn WHERE (lower(assets.asset_fqn) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(assets.table_name) LIKE '%dashboard%' OR lower(assets.data_product) LIKE '%dashboard%') AND (assets.is_critical = TRUE OR assets.is_certified = FALSE OR assets.open_work_count > 0 OR (quality.executed_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AND lower(COALESCE(quality.outcome, '')) NOT IN ('pass', 'passed', 'success', 'succeeded')) OR (work.created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('WEEK', CURRENT_DATE) AND lower(COALESCE(work.status, '')) IN ('pending', 'open')) ) ORDER BY quality.exec

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governanc

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance A

For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance A

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance A

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 64.9% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governanc

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance A

Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned.

helpState.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center SM Skyler Myers Admin Workspace › datapact.atlas ⌘K UC connected · 0% coverage Atlas AI Help & docs How Governance Atlas works A short, task-oriented guide to discovery, governance, and access. For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset. Who sees what On-behalf-of access When your workspace grants the app the OBO (on-behalf-of) scope, Governance A

For a deeper reference and the full change log, visit the GitHub README. ← Back to Discovery Getting started Who sees what Keyboard shortcuts Getting help Privacy Terms Getting started What is Governance Atlas? Governance Atlas is a Databricks-native metadata command center. It discovers Unity Catalog tables, views, columns, and notebook usage in your workspace and surfaces governance context (domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, workflow state, lineage) in one place. How do I find an asset? Use the global search bar at the top of the shell, the Discovery tab for faceted browsing across the catalog, or the Navigation tab for breadth-first catalog-tree browsing. Filters on the left rail narrow by catalog, schema, asset type, domain, owner, sensitivity, glossary term, and workflow state. What do the coverage badges mean? The coverage score on each asset card reflects how complete the asset's governance record is (description, owner, domain, glossary term, quality rules). High Coverage is at least 75%. Mid Coverage is 50-74%. Low Coverage is below 50%. The chip is hidden when the governance backfill has not run for that asset.
